prestazioni: Engine: 2.5L TFSI CDL/CJX (I5) – Full forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 CR), Pauter billet steel crankshaft, and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods with ARP 2000 rod bolts. Upgraded to a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (1.06 A/R, 62mm compressor) with a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe and Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate for 550whp on E85 with a Cobb Accessport Pro-Tune by Stratified Automotive Controls.

Drivetrain: 0B5 DQ500 7-speed S tronic transmission reinforced with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily disc and Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel. Quaife ATB helical LSD for the rear (0AJ) differential with upgraded output flanges and 80W-140 Motul Gear 300 fluid. Custom 1000hp-rated driveshafts from The Driveshaft Shop with CV joints from GKN.

Suspension & Handling: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 400lb/in front springs, 600lb/in rear springs) with spherical bearing top mounts from 034 Motorsport. Full poly bushings (034 Motorsport subframe, control arm, and diff mounts) paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars. Brembo GT 6-piston 380mm front and 2-piston 330mm rear big brake kit with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Body: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and exposed carbon fiber hood from Seibon. OEM+ RS3-style side skirts and rear bumper with integrated tow hook. Custom 3D-printed carbon fiber side mirrors from APR Performance.

Aero: Custom front splitter from Verus Engineering (35mm overhang, 3D-printed carbon fiber) with integrated canards from APR. Rear wing is a custom 9 Lives Racing GT wing (carbon fiber, 1800mm width, 300mm chord) mounted on OEM RS3 roof spoiler mounts with adjustable angle (0-15 degrees). Underbody aero includes a full carbon fiber diffuser from Eventuri and a custom belly pan from 034 Motorsport.

Wheels & Stance: Forged BBS FI-R 9.5x19 ET32 (front) and 11x19 ET25 (rear) wheels with custom gold/polished finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/30/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Air Lift Performance 3P management with custom 3-gallon tank and AccuAir ENDO-CVT controllers. Fender roll and pull with custom 5mm spacers for aggressive flush fitment.
